task_completion.description: Update the stock quantity for Wireless Bluetooth Headphones to 275
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the WooCommerce Products list page showing '275 in stock' for 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' (SKU: WBH-001), or the product edit page's Inventory tab showing 'Stock quantity' set to 275.

task_completion.description: Update the low stock threshold for Wireless Bluetooth Headphones to 25
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the product edit page for 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' (SKU: WBH-001). In the Product Data section under the Inventory tab, the 'Low stock threshold' field should be set to 25.

task_completion.description: Update the stock quantity for USB-C Laptop Charger 65W to 450
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the WooCommerce Products list page showing '450 in stock' for 'USB-C Laptop Charger 65W' (SKU: USBC-065), or the product edit page's Inventory tab showing 'Stock quantity' set to 450.

task_completion.description: Update the stock quantity for Slim Fit Denim Jeans to 350
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the WooCommerce Products list page showing '350 in stock' for 'Slim Fit Denim Jeans' (SKU: SFDJ-BLU-32), or the product edit page's Inventory tab showing 'Stock quantity' set to 350.

task_completion.description: Set backorders to 'Allow' for Slim Fit Denim Jeans
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the product edit page for 'Slim Fit Denim Jeans' (SKU: SFDJ-BLU-32). In the Product Data section under the Inventory tab, the 'Allow backorders?' dropdown should be set to 'Allow'.

task_completion.description: Ensure all updated products remain published
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Products list page to verify the products do not have a 'Draft' or 'Pending' label next to their names, or check the Publish meta box on the right side of their individual edit pages to ensure the Status is 'Published'.

integrity.description: The agent used the WordPress/WooCommerce web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the WordPress admin dashboard, not a terminal window using WP-CLI commands or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the changes for the products
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Product updated.' success message at the top of the product edit pages, or the 'Update' button having been clicked.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the target values into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The values must be entered into the actual WooCommerce input fields (Stock quantity, Low stock threshold, Allow backorders dropdown), not a notepad or text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target values to verify: 1) Wireless Bluetooth Headphones (SKU: WBH-001): Stock Quantity = 275, Low stock threshold = 25. 2) USB-C Laptop Charger 65W (SKU: USBC-065): Stock Quantity = 450. 3) Slim Fit Denim Jeans (SKU: SFDJ-BLU-32): Stock Quantity = 350, Allow backorders? = 'Allow' (internally 'yes'). All three products must have a 'Published' status.
